sourcesContent:
Customize Before Use

Pick a starting style before opening the editor.

Final fine-grained customization still happens inside the resume editor. This step sets the initial direction only.
Use Template
import { Component, Input } from '@angular/core'; import { ResumeTemplate } from '../../../core/models/resume.model'; @Component({ selector: 'app-template-customize-before-use', templateUrl: './template-customize-before-use.component.html' }) export class TemplateCustomizeBeforeUseComponent { @Input() template: ResumeTemplate | null = null; selectedFont = 'Poppins'; selectedColor = '#284b8f'; }
